import json, os, sys, re, unicodedata, itertools, math, textwrap, random

import json, re, unicodedata, os, sys, textwrap
quran_path="/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path="/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(quran_path,'r') as f:
    quran=json.load(f)
with open(hadith_path,'r') as f:
    hadith=json.load(f)
len(quran), len(hadith)

# define normalization: remove diacritics, tatweel, punctuation, unify hamza
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel = re.compile(r'[\u0640]')
punct = re.compile(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]')
def normalize(s):
    s = re.sub(tatweel, '', s)
    s = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', s)
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه').replace('ى','ي')
    s = re.sub(punct,' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

orig_full = "دعا نوح لقومه 950 سنة، فلما فرغ منها قال: «أَتَدْرُونَ مَنْ يَدَعُ دِينَهُ وَيُشَيَّعُ النَاسَ عَلى هَذِهِ الْأَرْضِ؟» فَقَالُوا: «مَن ذَا يَزَعُ مِنَ اللَهِ؟» فَقَالَ: «وَلَوْ كُنتُ أُخِذَ بِالرَقَبَةِ وَأُفَضَّ عَنِ النَاسِ بِالرُزَقِ، لَمُذَكَرَ لَكُمُ"
snippet = "دعا نوح لق...َرَ لَكُمُ"
norm_full = normalize(orig_full)
norm_full[:200], norm_full[-100:]

# broader search: look for "دعا نوح" or "نوح لقومه"
kwds = ["دعا نوح","نوح لقومه","فلما فرغ","950","الف سنه الا خمسين عاما"]
cands=[]
for rec in hadith:
    txt=get_matn_text(rec)
    if not txt: 
        continue
    n=normalize(txt)
    if any(normalize(k) in n for k in kwds):
        cands.append(txt)
len(cands)

# search quran for نوح and لبث
hits=[v for v in quran if 'ayah_text' in v and 'نُوح' in v['ayah_text'] or 'نُوحًا' in v['ayah_text']]
len(hits), [h['ayah_text'] for h in hits[:5]]

# find the verse about "الف سنة الا خمسين عاما"
[v['ayah_text'] for v in quran if 'أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ إِلَّا خَمْسِينَ عَامًا' in v.get('ayah_text','')]

verse = [v['ayah_text'] for v in quran if 'أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ إِلَّا خَمْسِينَ عَامًا' in v.get('ayah_text','')][0]
verse

# check any with نوح
c=[]
for rec in hadith:
    txt=get_matn_text(rec) or ''
    if ('أَلْف' in txt or 'ألف' in txt) and ('نوح' in txt or 'نُوح' in txt):
        c.append(txt)
len(c)
